description: Phishing templates impersonating HR and payroll systems — high-value targets for payroll diversion

templates.name: Benefits Open Enrollment
suggested_subject_lines: Benefits Enrollment closes Friday — complete your selections
HR: Open enrollment period ends soon — action required
templates.notes: Best used during actual open enrollment periods (typically Q4) for maximum believability.

templates.name: Payroll Direct Deposit Update
suggested_subject_lines: HR: Update your direct deposit information before Thursday
Payroll: Action required — banking information needs verification
Important: Direct deposit change required for upcoming payroll
templates.notes: HIGH VALUE: Payroll diversion attacks are among the most financially damaging. Time near payroll processing dates for maximum click rate.

templates.name: HR Open Enrollment Reminder
suggested_subject_lines: ACTION REQUIRED: Annual Employee Benefits Election Deadline
URGENT: Benefits Open Enrollment Period Ending Soon
Enrollment Notice: Action required for your health benefits selection
templates.notes: Annual open enrollment deadlines are standard seasonal corporate events. Employees are highly motivated to click to avoid losing health benefits coverage.

templates.name: HR Year-End Bonus Notification
suggested_subject_lines: CONFIDENTIAL: Company Year-End Bonus Statement & Payout details
Year-End Bonus Notice: Verify payroll details for bonus disbursement
Payroll: Review your year-end bonus calculation
templates.notes: Year-end bonuses are highly anticipated events. Phishing simulations using bonus lures have high click rates due to greed and curiosity triggers.
